industry.headline: Nagaland Bids for 1.65 MW Rooftop Solar Systems
industry.summary: The Department of Power in Nagaland has invited bids for 1.65 MW of grid-connected rooftop solar systems. These installations will be at village council halls under the Chief Minister's Community Solar Partnership Initiative. The Nagaland Solar Mission includes this program as part of its renewable energy strategy. Bids are due by June 24, 2026, with opening the following day.
industry.searchQuery: Nagaland Invites Bids for 1.65 MW Rooftop Solar Sy 2026

industry.headline: NTPC Floats O&M Tender for 20 MW Gujarat Solar Project
industry.summary: NTPC has invited bids for two years of operation and maintenance of its 20 MW solar project. The facility is located at Jhanor Gandhar Gas Power Plant in Bharuch district, Gujarat. NTPC seeks qualified contractors to provide comprehensive O&M services for this solar installation. The tender supports ongoing operations of the state-owned energy giant's renewable assets.
industry.searchQuery: NTPC Floats O&M Tender for 20 MW Solar Project in  2026

industry.headline: KHS Machinery Meets 65% Power Needs with Solar Project
industry.summary: KHS Machinery has achieved 65% of its power requirements through rooftop solar. The Germany-based company installed a 750.2 kW solar project at its facility in Nandej, Gujarat. This installation will save the industrial equipment manufacturer ₹7.7 million annually. The rooftop solar system demonstrates how C&I consumers can reduce grid dependence and electricity costs.
industry.searchQuery: KHS Machinery Meets 65% of Power Needs with Roofto 2026

industry.headline: Cypress Creek Secures $3.5 Billion for Steel River Energy Center
industry.summary: Cypress Creek Energy, a U.S.-based solar and energy storage project developer, has secured $3.5 billion in financing. This funding is designated for the first two phases of the Steel River Energy Center project. The developer focuses on solar and energy storage solutions to support the project's development and financial requirements for this specific energy center initiative.
industry.searchQuery: Cypress Creek Secures $3.5 Billion for Steel River 2026

industry.headline: Military Engineer Services Issues O&M Tender for 6 MW Solar
industry.summary: Military Engineer Services (MES) has invited bids for the comprehensive operation and maintenance (O&M) of solar projects. The tender covers a 4 MW and a 2 MW solar project located at the Army area in Jodhpur, Rajasthan. These combined 6 MW of projects require professional O&M services to ensure continued operational efficiency within the military installation.
industry.searchQuery: Military Engineer Services Floats O&M Tender for 6 2026

industry.headline: Bihar Regulator Approves Tariffs for 275 MW Rooftop Solar
industry.summary: Bihar Electricity Regulatory Commission (BERC) has approved tariffs discovered through competitive bidding for rooftop solar power. The procurement involves nearly 275 MW of rooftop solar power from approximately 250,000 Kutir Jyoti consumers across Bihar. This regulatory approval facilitates the procurement of solar energy from a large number of residential consumers under the specific Kutir Jyoti scheme.
industry.searchQuery: Bihar Regulator Approves Tariff for 275 MW Rooftop 2026

tech.headline: Fraunhofer Sets New 34.4% Solar Module Efficiency Record
tech.summary: Fraunhofer Institute for Solar Energy Systems (ISE) achieved a 34.4 percent efficiency using its own III‑V germanium photovoltaic module, marking the latest world record for solar‑module performance.
tech.searchQuery: Most Efficient Solar Module in the World — New Rec 2026

tech.headline: Sierra Club Urges Climate Accountability in NYC Pension Asset Search
tech.summary: Sierra Club welcomes the search for asset managers for New York City’s five public pension systems announced by Comptroller Mark Levine and trustees. The organization urges that passive indexing service mandates be awarded only to firms demonstrating responsible stewardship and credible climate-risk management. The search opens a review of major asset managers to ensure strong climate accountability within the city's pension systems.
tech.searchQuery: Sierra Club Welcomes NYC Pension Search for Asset  2026

tech.headline: Descartes Underwriting Partners with Nextpower for Wind Insurance Solutions
tech.summary: Descartes Underwriting integrated data-driven wind insurance solutions with Nextpower to protect solar plants from straight-line winds. tech.summary: Peak Energy partnered with General Motors to develop sodium-ion battery cells for grid storage. GM will manufacture cells in Michigan, retaining exclusive rights. The post GM to manufacture sodium-ion battery cells for Peak Energy BESS appeared first on Solar Power World.
